title: DSSE Envelope (v1, Chassis subset)
description: Dead Simple Signing Envelope (https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse). Field names are camelCase by DSSE specification — this is the documented exception to the project-wide snake_case preference. Chassis writes payloadType = application/vnd.in-toto+json and a single Ed25519 signature.

payload.description: Base64-encoded payload bytes (the in-toto Statement JSON, in Chassis's case).

payloadType.description: Media type of the decoded payload. Chassis always emits 'application/vnd.in-toto+json'.
